category_title: Reserved students who only share knowledge when directly prompted by an adult
scenario_title: Understanding isolating variables with seed germination bags
minimal_context: The student is working with seed germination bags in an out-of-school science workshop to understand the logic of isolating variables and identify what seeds need to grow.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to use these seed germination bags for an experiment designed to identify what seeds need in order to grow.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Looks quietly at the particular set of seed germination bags.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What do you think we should do next?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Remains quiet while looking at the experiment designed to identify what seeds need in order to grow.)

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Keep trying to understand the logic of isolating variables during the experiment.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Becomes visibly frustrated while trying to understand the logic of isolating variables.)

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: We need to use these seed germination bags for an experiment designed to identify what seeds need in order to grow.

STUDENT: (Looks quietly at the particular set of seed germination bags.)

TUTOR: What do you think we should do next?

STUDENT: (Remains quiet while looking at the experiment designed to identify what seeds need in order to grow.)

TUTOR: Keep trying to understand the logic of isolating variables during the experiment.

STUDENT: (Becomes visibly frustrated while trying to understand the logic of isolating variables.)

task.content: Understand the logic of isolating variables during an experiment designed to identify what seeds need in order to grow
task.learning_goal: Identify what seeds need in order to grow

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: While trying to understand the logic of isolating variables during an experiment

behavior_patterns.condition: While trying to understand the logic of isolating variables
